meaning: adj.(香槟酒)极干的,未加糖的酒n.低糖的酒
examples: I see, so this one which is called brut must have been made from grapes grown in a different region?
And when you happen to bring along a bottle of Bollinger Brut rose, as I did recently, the experience is unbeatable.
Memories, including mine, are created here, under bursts of stars and over Champagne brut.
Of course, all the better "brut" Champagnes do this with great flair anyway.
